title: eurya lasiopetala
intro: Eurya lasiopetala, also known as the Chinese wolfberry or Chinese rowan, is a plant species belonging to the family Pentaphyllaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eurya lasiopetala include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Eurya lasiopetala is traditionally prepared as a tea, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements, capsules, and infusions.
